import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from transformers import CLIPModel, CLIPProcessor


class FMoWClassifier(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_classes=62, model_name='openai/clip-vit-large-patch14', dropout=0.1):
        super().__init__()
        self.clip = CLIPModel.from_pretrained(model_name)
        # Only use vision encoder
        self.vision_model = self.clip.vision_model
        hidden_size = self.clip.config.vision_config.hidden_size  # 1024 for ViT-L
        
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_size),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(hidden_size, num_classes)
        )
        
        # Free text model memory
        del self.clip
        
    def forward(self, pixel_values):
        outputs = self.vision_model(pixel_values=pixel_values)
        # Use CLS token (pooler output)
        pooled = outputs.pooler_output  # [B, hidden_size]
        logits = self.classifier(pooled)
        return logits
